events.deescalation_rule: De-escalate once ambiguity collapses and the work reduces to a narrow bounded edit set.
events.escalation_rule: Escalate one tier if constraints are missed twice, ambiguity grows, or the task proves more coupled than the current frame indicates.
events.lane_claim:

Your only job is the named target symbol. Allowed exits only: (1) Agda source diff + targeted agda validation passes for the target file; (2) Agda source diff + exact Agda stderr showing the missing upstream type/symbol; (3) empty diff + one-line named authority-boundary escalation with exact receipt shape. Forbidden exits, automatic lane failure and no useful retry: no Agda diff unless authority boundary, new postulate, weakened theorem type, promotion flag set without inhabited upstream receipts, audit/summary/next-steps/blocker-map/candidate/scaffold/decomposition/doc-only update. Do not create a new obligation surface for this symbol. Do not rename the symbol to something weaker. Touch only the target module and direct imports needed for compilation. Include the exact validation command you ran.
